summary: Frontend-only testing of 14 new features: Header nav centering, scroll-triggered CTA (desktop+mobile), Hero tight spacing, PodcastSection light background, Testimonials 3-col layout. One data-ordering bug found and fixed: Arthur K. and Hernan D. were swapped in plr-de.js clients array.
critical_code_review_comments: plr-de.js clients array had Hernan D. at index 2 and Arthur K. at index 3, but TestimonialsSection.jsx destructures rest as [alexander, arthur, hernan] — expecting Arthur at index 2 and Hernan at index 3. This caused Hernan to appear in the top-right slot (with Alexander) and Arthur to appear at the bottom, opposite to the requirement. Fixed by swapping their positions in the clients array.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified all 14 new features. (1) Header Desktop: nav.flex-none centered between two flex-1 zones, 5 nav items confirmed. CTA opacity-0 at scroll=0, opacity-100 after 700px. (2) Header Mobile (390px): burger visible, CTA opacity-0 at scroll=0, INTRO CALL appears after 700px scroll. (3) Hero: p.mt-0.5 tight spacing for 'Bist du bereit zuhoeren?' confirmed. Video element with onVideoEnded in DOM. (4) PodcastSection: bg-transparent class (cream background), h2 has text-brand-deep (rgb 34,65,96). (5) Testimonials: Anna (card-0) has md:row-span-2 + photo, h=647px. Post-fix: Alexander W. (card-1) top-center x=784, Arthur K. (card-3) top-right x=1160, same y=216. Hernan D. (card-2) bottom-center y=552. Empty dashed slot at x=1160, y=552. Mobile: all 4 cards at x=24, single column stack. (6) No JS errors. BUG FIXED: Swapped Hernan D. (index 2) and Arthur K. (index 3) in plr-de.js clients array to match code destructuring order.

features_tested.header_desktop_nav_centered: PASS - nav has flex-none class between two flex-1 zones, all 5 links present
features_tested.header_mobile_no_cta_at_scroll0: PASS - mobile CTA div has opacity-0 + pointer-events-none
features_tested.hero_tight_spacing_mt05: PASS - p.mt-0.5 found with text 'Bist du bereit zuhoeren?'
features_tested.hero_video_onVideoEnded: PASS - video element in DOM, onVideoEnded wired in code
features_tested.podcast_text_brand_deep: PASS - h2 has text-brand-deep (rgb 34,65,96 dark blue)
features_tested.testimonials_anna_row_span2: PASS - md:row-span-2 class, h=647px, has photo
features_tested.testimonials_alexander_arthur_top_row: PASS (after fix) - same y=216, x diff=376px
features_tested.testimonials_hernan_bottom: PASS (after fix) - Hernan at y=552 (below Alexander at y=216)
features_tested.testimonials_empty_placeholder: PASS - hidden md:block border-dashed at x=1160, y=552
features_tested.testimonials_mobile_stacked: PASS - all at x=24, single column on 390px viewport

rca_of_bug_fixed: Root cause: plr-de.js testimonials.clients array order was [Anna, Alexander, Hernan, Arthur] but TestimonialsSection.jsx destructures rest array as const [alexander, arthur, hernan] = rest, which maps index 2 to 'arthur' variable and index 3 to 'hernan' variable. Since Hernan was at index 2, it was assigned to the 'arthur' slot (top-right grid position) and Arthur at index 3 was assigned to the 'hernan' slot (bottom-center). Fix: Reordered clients array to [Anna, Alexander, Arthur, Hernan] to match code expectations.
